scope: Expose executor file generation and validation over HTTP in services/executor

integration_points.note: sanitizeExecutorOutput strips unsafe paths and normalizes executor payloads
writeFiles persists sanitized executor files to disk with path safety checks
validateFilesNonEmpty reports missing or empty artifacts after generation
Express composition point where new /generate and /validate routers must be mounted
Reference implementation for router validation + problem details handling

risks: Must return RFC 9457 problem details payloads on validation errors to match repo standards
Project root paths come from caller; improper validation could allow directory traversal if not normalized
Need parity with monolith responses so orchestrator callers do not break during migration
next_steps: Design request/response schema mirroring monolith executor helpers
Implement services/executor/src/routes/generate.ts and validate.ts with problem details handling
Add Vitest coverage for happy path and error branches, including validation failures
